title: meiostemon tetrandrus
intro: Meiostemon tetrandrus is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. It is native to the island of New Caledonia and is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Meiostemon tetrandrus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, coughs, and respiratory issues.
